TextENGNew: ``Can you hear me, Maebara-saaaan!!@k@vS09/11/170700623. And Ryuugu-san too!!@k@vS09/11/170700624. It's too dangerous to stay up there!!@k@vS09/11/170700625. It could explode at any moment!!@k@vS09/11/170700626. There's a flower bed below the building -- jump down into it!!!``
changeReason: New preserves elongated calling (Maebara-saaaan) from JPN. Also 'by the school building' vs 'below the building' -- JPN 校舎の下 means below.

TextENGNew: ``A flower bed?@k@vS09/01/170101377. Damn it, I can't tell where it is from up here...``
changeReason: Original 'I can't see it from here' vs new 'I can't tell where it is from up here' adds spatial context of being on a roof.

TextENGNew: Unfortunately, there was no time to leisurely search for a flower bed.
changeReason: Original 'it didn't sound like I had enough time' vs new explicitly names 'flower bed' per JPN 花壇.

TextENGNew: ......A white hand appeared at the edge of the roof... followed by Rena's head.
Rena was no longer hurrying. She climbed onto the roof with slow, deliberate movements.
changeReason: New captures JPN もはや焦らず (no longer hurrying) which original omits.

TextENGNew: I stood there calmly, waiting for her...
changeReason: Original omits JPN 悠然と (calmly); new includes it.

TextENGNew: ``...I never imagined you'd find what I hid up here...@k@vS09/02/170201658. ...With this... it's all... a failure...``
changeReason: Original omits 'what I hid up here' per JPN. Also 'all for nothing' vs 'a failure' -- JPN 失敗 means failure.

TextENGNew: Rena clawed frantically at her own neck.
changeReason: Original 'scratched at her throat' vs new 'clawed frantically at her neck.' JPN バリバリと掻き毟る is violent clawing; 首 is neck not throat.

TextENGNew: The bandages she'd so carefully applied had all peeled away, revealing raw, painful-looking scratches oozing blood...
changeReason: New captures more of JPN's detail about painful scratches oozing blood that original simplifies.

TextENGNew: ``Game over, Rena!!!``
We stood facing each other on the second-story roof of the school.
...This was it -- the final round of our club activities, real-combat edition!
changeReason: Old says 'This wasn't a club activity, but a real battle!' but Japanese says 'club activities, real-combat edition!' -- opposite framing.

TextENGNew: At first, Rena had glared at me with pure hatred for ruining her plan,
...But partway through, something like resignation seemed to settle over her, and she let out a small laugh before breaking into a bold, defiant grin.
changeReason: Original 'smiling wickedly' vs new 'bold, defiant grin.' JPN 不敵に means bold/fearless, not wicked.

TextENGNew: The chorus of the higurashi cicadas seemed to be trying to cool the sweat of our battle...
...But it didn't seem like we'd be needing that service anytime soon.
``If this were a board game, this would be the finish line and your victory, Keiichi-kun.@k@vS09/02/170201660. But this isn't a game.``
changeReason: Original merges dialogue entries and missing closing quotes. New properly formats with 'Keiichi-kun' addressing.

TextENGNew: ``That's why this isn't the finish line -- it's a dead end.``

``...Tch, you really don't know when to admit defeat...@k@vS09/01/170101380. ...Rena, you really are incredibly strong.@k@vS09/01/170101381. You never give in, never break.@k@vS09/01/170101382. You fight to the very end.@k@vS09/01/170101383. And you believe to the very end, too.``
``Being praised at a time like this doesn't make me happy in the least...@k@vS09/02/170201663. You destroyed the plan I'd staked my very life on, Keiichi-kun.``

``...I was desperately fighting to protect humanity from the aliens, and you went and ruined it all.@k@vS09/02/170201665. If humanity goes extinct because of this... it'll go down in history as YOUR fault, Keiichi-kun!!!``
changeReason: Original omits JPN 必死に (desperately); new includes 'desperately fighting.'

TextENGNew: I hadn't meant to laugh, but I might have snorted a little.
changeReason: Original 'I couldn't help it' (certainty) vs new 'I might have snorted a little' (uncertainty matching JPN かもしれない).

TextENGNew: ...If my name went down in alien history books as the man who destroyed the human race, that was actually kind of cool, wasn't it?
``Rena.@k@vS09/01/170101385. No matter what you say, I've already won this game.@k@vS09/01/170101386. I've already won -- you just refuse to admit your loss. That's all.``
``............Yeah, maybe you're right.``

``But maybe that's just how things work.@k@vS09/01/170101388. A game doesn't end when there's a winner.@k@vS09/01/170101389. It ends when there's a loser.@k@vS09/01/170101390. ...Which means me winning alone isn't enough.``
changeReason: Old says 'maybe that's not how it works' but Japanese means 'maybe that's just how things work' -- opposite implication.
Original 'Hmm?' vs new 'Oh...?' -- JPN へぇ expresses surprise, which new captures.

TextENGNew: I tapped the metal bat against my shoulder, and with my other hand, beckoned Rena to come at me.
changeReason: Original omits 'with my other hand' which is in JPN もう片方の手で.

TextENGNew: ``It means I'm going to beat into you -- body and soul -- that you've lost.``
changeReason: Original 'make you understand' vs new 'beat into you.' JPN 叩き込む means to pound/beat into.

TextENGNew: I won't run. I won't hide.@k ...Why?
Because our club charter has no provision for desertion in the face of the enemy!!
changeReason: Different register: casual 'rules of our club' vs formal 'club charter/desertion.' JPN uses formal terms.

TextENGNew: ``I'll settle this right here and now.@k@vS09/01/170101393. I'll prove to you that you've already lost, Rena!!``
changeReason: New preserves 'settle this right here' from JPN ここで白黒をつけてやるぜ which original omits.

TextENGNew: ``Here goes.@k@vS09/01/170101396. Parasites and aliens?@k@vS09/01/170101397. Are you an idiot? Stupid.@k@vS09/01/170101398. Who believes in that stuff nowadays? How lame.@k@vS09/01/170101399. I can't help but laugh -- hahahahaha!!

"...You never believed me from the start... you pretended to believe... and you deceived Rena......!!@k@vS09/02/170201670. I'll never forgive you...@k@vS09/02/170201671. I'll never forgive you, never forgive you...!!"

"It's your business if you want to believe that stuff, Rena.@k@vS09/01/170101401. But I'm not buying into anything that sketchy!@k@vS09/01/170101402. If I'm gonna believe in something, the Tokugawa buried treasure sounds way more fun!"
``If you still want to make me believe... there's a simple way for us club members to settle this, isn't there?``
``......The winner is right... is that it...!``
"Exactly!!"
Rena and I shared a grin, then began circling each other on the sloping rooftop, slowly measuring the distance between us.
"If you can beat me to a pulp, Rena, then fine—I'll believe your alien story!!"
``I'll do a suspicious dance morning and night to summon UFOs, and go to the cow barn for cattle mutilation!!``
"But Rena.@k@vS09/01/170101408. If I beat you senseless, then you'd better be ready!!"
"Ahhahahahahahahahahahahahahahaha!!!"
"There's no need to decide that, I don't think there is!@k@vS09/02/170201675. There's no way I'd lose to you, Keiichi-kun!!"
I caught it easily with the metal bat.
For a split second, I thought I saw sparks fly.
``Hey, don't be so sure -- you might be surprised, you know?!``
"Going through all those fierce battles in the club, I finally came to understand something."
I learned about myself!
Now I know what I need... to bring out my ultimate power.``
``Really?@k@vS09/02/170201677. I wonder what it is...
I wonder!!``
Rena, your hatchet can be a powerful weapon.
But my metal bat is as powerful as your hatchet.
Sure, it doesn't have a blade, but it reaches farther and it's easy to handle!
I won't be going for a defensive battle!
I'm going to fight you face to face, and I'm going to defeat you!!
I'm sure I'm stronger than you physically, but you're better at drawing out your true potential, Rena.
In other words, we're equally matched!!@k This is great!@k I won't need to hold back at all!
``So what are you going to do after you beat me?
Take that, that, and that!!!
Hmm, I think I might have the upper hand!``
``Huh!
I'm just warming up!
Just you wait and see!
Wait and see what I do after I take you down!
We've both put a lot of chips on the pile!
Prepare yourself for having to make a big payout!!!``
``Ahahahahahahahahahahahahahaha!!
Aren't you counting your chickens before they've hatched?
Your bluffing is just pathetic!``
``Heh heh heh!
You don't get it, do you?
My strength increases in proportion to my reward, don't you know?
Let's see...!!
You'll be my personal maid!!
Starting from the moment I wake up until I go to sleep at night, you'll serve me all day, every day!
With Coach's help, you'll be wearing a different costume every day!!
Wait, until I go to sleep at night?
What if I make it so that you won't let me sleep instead?!
How 'bout that?``
``Ahahahahahahahahahahahahahaha. Ahhhh ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha!!
That's so like you, Keiichi-kun!
No, thank you!
Actually, I'll win, and make you my servant!!``
Ah ha ha ha ha!!
We both laughed like crazy people as we struck at each other!!
It was strange how much fun it was becoming.
Rena and I were trying to kill each other... and yet, it was a blast!
Sparks were flying. We could get seriously injured!!
If we fell off of the rooftop, we'd break our bones, yet this was so much fun!!
I had been mourning and crying all day today while Rena terrified me.
How did all that turn into this?
``The two of us can't be serious even if we try!
Even with sparks flying, we can only goof around!!``
``Too bad!
That's not me. I like being elegant and graceful.
You can have fun goofing around by yourself, Keiichi-kun!!``
Rena's next strike came at a strange angle, but I managed to deflect it!
``Whoa!!
Taahaha!!
That's too, too weak. You're done!``
``Ha ha!
Finally, I'm all warmed up.
This is just a warm-up, right?``
``Huh?
Stupid, this isn't even a warm-up.
This is like taking a walk.@k@vS09/01/170101437. Hey, you're all sweaty.``
``Hee hee hee hee, ah ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha!!
Instead of sweat, you'll be covered in your own blood!!``
``Maebara-san!!
Jump off!!@k@vS09/19/173100195. Come on, jump!!!
He isn't even listening to us!
He's so into it that he can't even hear anything...!@k@vS09/19/173100199. ...Ooishi-san?``
``What do you mean 'what is it'?@k@vS09/19/173100200. We have to figure out a way to rescue him!``
Ooishi couldn't figure out why he was distracted, considering the seriousness of the situation.
He was engrossed in watching the two of them fight with the sunset behind them.
But Ooishi wasn't the only one.
Everyone watching was captivated by their battle on the rooftop.
At that moment, a sudden loud voice broke the silence.
``M-Maebara-san, hang in there!!!
Careful, don't fall!!``
The students who were about to climb onto the ambulance@k were cheering him on.
Mion was being loaded onto a stretcher with bandages around her head, but even she sat up, captivated as she was by Rena and Keiichi's duel.
Our once-happy days were supposed to have shattered due to a series of misunderstandings. They were supposed to be irretrievable...
But... huh...... ...why?
Why did I feel this way...?
This was such a close game.
But it wouldn't be fun to stay in a stalemate forever!!
Rena and I kicked at each other with perfect timing, and increased the distance between us!
This is a blast!!!
What do you think, Rena?
Isn't this just the best?``
``Ahahahahahahahahahahaha!
I've been having fun since the very beginning!!
But it'll be even more fun to split your head open, Keiichi-kun!
Split it opeeen!!``
``Wow, that's dangerous!!@k@vS09/01/170101443. Over here!!
Come back over here!!
Let's use more space!!
Something like this doesn't happen too often!!
Let's enjoy it as much as we can!!``
``Ahhhahahahahahaha!!
This would make a great picture!
Look, there's a beautiful moon behind us!@k@vS09/02/170201704. The breeze feels great!!``
It was such a fantastical scene.
Two people were fighting on the rooftop of the school building, with the moon behind them. It was almost unbelievable.
All the policemen and children looked at that mysterious and fantastical scene from a distance, completely entranced.
Everyone was thinking the same thing,@k but nobody said anything.
...Why does it look like they're having fun?
``Getting all fired up in a breeze this cool...
It reminds me of the Watanagashi festival!!
I don't really like to just sit back and enjoy the cool of the evening in silence!
When the moon comes up, I turn into an animal!!``
All us club members went crazy on the night of Watanagashi!
The mayor scolded us by the end of it, but we laughed at each other, and promised to do the same thing again next year!!
``Going crazy under the moon, huh? That sounds cool, doesn't it?
Maybe we're already crazy!!``
``Yeah, I feel the same!!
We're having fun trying to kill each other... we must be mad already!!@k@vS09/01/170101454. This must be what insanity is like!!``
Some people say the moon has the power to arouse passions in people.
Maybe that's true, and maybe it's not.
One thing that's for sure is that even if it were a new moon tonight,
we would still feel the same way!!!
As our surroundings got darker, the sparks we'd create with each hit started to look like fireflies.
Hey now, isn't there gasoline in the drain pipe right nearby?@k Ahhhahahahahaha, who cares? If an explosion happens, it happens!!
``Hey, what are you doing?
Are you getting too sweaty to hold the bat?
Why don't you take a break and dry your hands off?@k@vS09/02/170201710. I'll split your head open while you do that, though!!``
``Wa ha ha ha!!
That's a good one!!
Isn't your skirt clinging to your legs? You can take it off if you want!!
I'll just watch you instead of attacking!!``
``Really?
Then I'll give you a good blow to the head while you're charmed by my legs!
Ahhahahahahaha!``
``This really is so much fun, isn't it, Rena?!!``
``Yep, it sure is!!!``
We flew!
We danced!
We struck! We laughed!
We stepped back once in a while to catch a breath, and then charged at each other and let the sparks fly!
We aimed at each other as we went around in circles on the rooftop of the school, our special stage.
Rena and I were all sweaty.
But we weren't exhausted yet. The beads of sweat rolling down my body just tickled me.
We exchanged furious blows one after the other.
Neither of us was at an advantage or disadvantage.
Neither of us exalted in victory or raged in defeat.
The battle with Rena in itself was fun.
It was like a dance.
A dance I couldn't dance by myself.
It was a dance I could only dance with someone with whom I was equally matched.
``Didn't you think the same thing I did when we did that club activity with the whole class...?@k@vS09/01/170101461. The day we duelled with water guns...``
``Yeah, I did!!``
````We wanted to fight like this again!!!````
As we thought that way on the rooftop, our classmates down below must've thought the same.
Our fight was so pure and passionate... that everyone thought the same thing!
We want to join them!!'
``It was the same back then!
We were using water guns, but we did the same thing!!!``
``But this is far more fun!!
I don't have to worry about how much water I have left in my gun!!``
``Yeah, we can't create sparks with water guns!``
``We couldn't strike at each other like this either!!!``
We both were breathing hard, waiting for the right timing to take a step forward.@k In the midst of that, we grinned at each other.
``Huff... huff...!
This is exactly what I said then, but I'm going to say it again.``
``Okay then, I'll respond just the same.``
We both smiled wickedly in the same moment!!
``This is so fun!
I don't want it to ever end!!``
``Ahahahaha!@k@vS09/02/170201722. Don't hate me if you lose!!``
``No, never!!
I'd hate myself for ending this game!!
But I know I won't be the one crying in the end!!``
``I don't know about that!
Your feet are getting weak, like they're made of straw!!``
``Shut uuuup!!@k@|@y@vS09/01/170101474. Whoaaaryaaahhhhh!!!``
Everyone was captivated by our fight.@k They were swept up in our fight.
We both had weapons.
Weapons deadly enough to seriously hurt one another!
But we were both perfectly matched and neither of us had hit the other yet!!
Why did they look so happy?@k This was just ridiculous...!
All the people below were just watching this fight on the rooftop with the beautiful moon as a backdrop.@k Not even the police could stop them!
This was impossible!!
This battle was absurd... and absolutely impossible!!
``Keiichi-san!!@k@vS09/04/170400204. Try to stay in the middle of the roof!!@k@vS09/04/170400205. Use the height to your advantage!!!``
Satoko and some of her classmates cheered Keiichi on, but there were some who were cheering for Rena too.
To them, this was no longer a fight to the death.
It was just the second round of their water gun battle.
A club activity is a club activity and a game is a game.
This was just the second round, so nobody would die.
Even though they had real weapons...
Nobody thought they would get hurt.
Rika wasn't cheering. She was just looking up at the rooftop.
``...I've...... never seen anything... like this before...``
Rika thought to herself.
She thought Keiichi could win.
Not just against Rena.
Rika thought Keiichi could even destroy the walls of the maze of tragedies that had no exit.
``What are the snipers doing?@k@vS09/00/ootaka17027. The suspect is trying to harm the hostage!@k@vS09/00/ootaka17028. Fire immediately!!``
As Ootaka yelled into the radio, Mion screamed for him to stop.

``No, no!!@k@vS09/03/170300711. Don't shoot Rena!!@k@vS09/03/170300712. Rena isn't crazy anymore!@k@vS09/03/170300713. She isn't who she was earlier!@k@vS09/03/170300714. That's a different Rena!@k@vS09/03/170300715. So please, don't shoot her!!``

``What do you mean, she's different?@k@vS09/00/ootaka17030. Look!@k@vS09/00/ootaka17031. She's swinging around that weapon!@k@vS09/00/ootaka17032. She's trying to kill him!@k@vS09/00/ootaka17033. Unless we shoot her down, the hostage is in danger!!``
``...No, no!!@k@vS09/03/170300717. Don't shoot at Rena!!
If you shoot Rena, Kei-chan will kill you for sure!!@k@vS09/03/170300719. I can guarantee it!!``
``Wh-Why would he kill me?``
``They aren't trying to kill each other!@k@vS09/03/170300721. They're just having fun creating sparks!!@k@vS09/03/170300722. Can't you see?
Kei-chan is talking to her, too.@k@vS09/03/170300724. He's telling her that they're equal!@k@vS09/03/170300725. That means she can trust him more than anyone!!
Kei-chan will wake Rena up!@k@vS09/03/170300727. No, he's already waking her up!!@k@vS09/03/170300728. Rena's nightmare is almost over!!``
``Keiichi-kun, you're the best!!@k@vS09/02/170201726. I don't even want to kill you anymore!!
A world without you would be so boring!!``
``Huh! Thanks for the compliment. I appreciate it!!
So what's going to happen to the world, huh?
Aren't aliens trying to invade it?``
``Ahahahahaahahaahahahahaha, ahhhahahahahahahahahahahahaahhahahahaha!!

You know, I don't think I even care about aliens or parasites anymore.@k@vS09/02/170201730. If the world is going to perish, go ahead and perish. Who cares about the conspiracy of the Three Families, anyway?``
``That's right, even if a meteor hits the Earth tomorrow...``
``Nothing could be more fun than this moment!!!!``
``Hey, aren't you supposed to die tonight due to some poison?
You sure don't look like you only have a few hours left to live!!``
``Ahahahahahahahahahahaha!!!
That's right, I completely forgot about that. I'm supposed to claw out my throat and die tonight!!``
``Hey, that's the scenario you came up with, don't forget.
Come on, scratch your throat once in a while, at least!!``
``Ahahahahahahahahahahaha!!!``
``Hey, I know, it doesn't itch anymore, does it?
It definitely doesn't!!
This is more fun than scratching your throat could ever be!``
``Yeah, this dance of ours really is way more fun!!!``
I wished it would never end!!
But my body was screaming.
I was breathing hard, and felt dizzy from lack of oxygen.
My upper body felt as light as a piece of paper, as if even a slight breeze could take me away.
...It really had been a blast, but I needed to end it soon...
I could feel the same sadness as in that water gun fight.
Back then, it had been declared a draw.
``I wonder what will happen this time...``
``Who knows?
But one thing is for certain.``
``What?``
``I loved doing this with you!!``
``Me too!!``
I jumped backwards and slammed the roof with my bat.
The sound was as intense as a huge drum,
and the noise woke up the people who were captivated by our fight.
The silence returned, and the chorus of higurashi filled the air.
``Okay...... let's pause for a moment.``
``......Sure.@k@vS09/02/170201739. Let's end this with one more strike.``
We started to move slowly... and increased the distance between us.
Everyone realized it.
This fight was ending very soon.
``Okay, this is it.@k@vS09/01/170101492. I'm going to ask you one more time.``
``Hmm? What is it?``
``Ahahahaha, hey, you're betting something on this, right?@k@vS09/01/170101494. Isn't that why you were fighting?``
``I did?
Ahahahahahaha, sorry, I forgot.``

``Tsk. You're hopeless.@k@vS09/01/170101496. Okay, listen carefully.@k@vS09/01/170101497. If I win,@k@vS09/01/170101498. you'll become my personal maid and serve me every day!!@k@vS09/01/170101499. You'll have introduce me to others as your master!!``
``Ahahahahahahahahahahaha, my uniform better be cute!``

``Of course it will.@k@vS09/01/170101501. There will be a variety of uniforms, ranging from old-fashioned ones to ones that are a little dangerous!!@k@vS09/01/170101502. They'll be custom-made so they'll fit you perfectly.@k@vS09/01/170101503. How about that?``
``My goodness.@k@vS09/02/170201745. I don't intend to lose, but that could be fun, somehow.@k@vS09/02/170201746. Ahahahahaha.``
``If you win, Rena.``
I paused for a moment.
``If you win, I'll believe your stories.``
Rena was happy until just a moment ago, but that expression was suddenly wiped from her face.

``Aliens are invading the Earth and we have parasites in our brains.@k@vS09/01/170101507. The Sonozaki family is pulling the strings, they're researching the parasites in secret, and aliens will be in control of the world starting tomorrow. I will believe in that.
Also, since you're dying tonight,@k@vS09/01/170101509. I'll make sure you go peacefully, so don't worry.``
``......It's not fun if I win, is it?@k@vS09/02/170201748. Your reward sounds a lot more fun, Keiichi-kun.``
``Well, what can I do?@k@vS09/01/170101511. You did all this because of what I just said, right?``
``...............Yeah, I guess...@k@vS09/02/170201750. Sorry, I almost forgot.``
Rena smiled sadly for a moment, but soon that expression was wiped off her face too.
``I'm going to win no matter what.@k@vS09/01/170101513. I want my personal maid!!``
``......Boo, boo.@k@vS09/02/170201752. It's not fun if I win.``
``Then do you want to change it?@k@vS09/01/170101515. What do you want?``
......Finally, Rena smiled happily again.
The breeze dried our sweat.@k It was a good feeling.
We no longer went crazy, even with the moon out.
We could finally enjoy the coolness of the evening.
It would be so nice if we could just lie down on our backs and gaze at the moon.
Still smiling a little, Rena spoke.
``I want the same reward as yours, Keiichi-kun.``
``What?@k@vS09/01/170101517. You want me to be your maid?@k@vS09/01/170101518. That's something.``

``You don't have to be my maid.@k@vS09/02/170201755. But the rest is the same.@k@vS09/02/170201756. I want you to say 'good morning' to me every morning and 'good night' every night.@k@vS09/02/170201757. I want you to treat me well and let me play around all the time.
......Hmm?@k@vS09/02/170201759. Aha ha ha ha ha, I guess no matter who wins we'll always... be together.``
``We'll be together, but the one who gets the special treatment is different.``
``Aha! Ahahahahahahahahahahahahahahaha.``
````Hahahahaha! Hahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahaha.````
``Why am I fighting with someone I like so much?``
``I don't know.@k@vS09/01/170101522. Why are we on the rooftop?@k@vS09/01/170101523. Why did we even come up here in the first place?``
``Ahahahahaha, I don't know.@k@vS09/02/170201764. I forgot.``
``Maybe we're both airheads.@k@vS09/01/170101525. That's why we floated up here.``
``Yep, we're airhead buddies.``
``We're buddies, alright.``
````Ahahahahahahahahahahahahahahaha...````
``...Well then, shall we get started?@k@vS09/01/170101528. I don't want to cool down too much.``
``You're right.@k@vS09/02/170201769. We better finish up before it gets too cold.``
We readied our weapons and took our stances.
``I......@k@vS09/02/170201771. was going to suggest that we stop this. I really was.``
I shook my head slowly.

``No.@k@vS09/01/170101530. We have to finish this.@k@vS09/01/170101531. ...Otherwise, it won't end.@k@vS09/01/170101532. Our fight won't end.@k@vS09/01/170101533. We can't quit.@k@vS09/01/170101534. We have to bring it to an end.``
``...This isn't right.@k@vS09/02/170201773. It's possible that no matter who wins or loses, there will be no reward.``
``.........Even if that happens, we shouldn't hate each other.@k@vS09/01/170101536. So I'm going to tell you this now.``
``It was fun.``
``Yeah............ I feel the same way...``
``Rena...@k@vS09/01/170101539. Even if one of us dies, we'll see each other again.@k@vS09/01/170101540. And when we do...``
``We'll have fun in a normal way. We'll laugh together in a normal way. ......And we'll fall in love in a normal way. We won't doubt each other. We'll trust each other.
......And we'll meet again, right? For sure, right...?``
``Yes... for sure...``
Tears appeared in Rena's eyes...
I noticed I was about to break down, too.
``Okay......... are you ready?``
There was no signal.
But we stepped forward at the same time.
Our shadows jumped in the moonlight.
We were fighting so viciously earlier, but now it was like we were moving very slowly. We must have looked like a shadow play.
Everyone was watching the shadows dance.
Rena's shadow hit my metal bat violently.@|@y As a result, I let go of it...
The metal bat bounced once on the roof, then rolled down to the schoolyard.
I had lost my weapon.
Here was Rena's chance. Of course, she wouldn't miss it...
I was lying flat on the roof, and Rena got on top of me.
Rena's knees were holding down my arms, and there was no way for me to fight back.
The moon was divided into two.
The shadow of Rena's hatchet had split the moon right down the middle.
This was the end.
``......Shit, that was good.@k@vS09/01/170101544. I can't even pull my arms away.``
``Hey, Keiichi-kun.@k@vS09/02/170201779. ...It's over... right...?``
``Not yet.@k@vS09/01/170101546. It's not over until you swing down your hatchet.``
``......I don't wanna.``
``...I don't want to. ......I don't want to...``
Rena's arms were still raised, but tears were pouring from her eyes.
``...What happened?@k@vS09/02/170201783. What went wrong?@k@vS09/02/170201784. I loved everyone and I trusted everyone. When did I start to doubt them?``
``I don't know why I'm doing this to you... I don't know.@k@vS09/02/170201786. ...Why, why am I doing this to people... I love so much?``
``You... You realized it.@k@vS09/01/170101550. You realized it in 'this' world!!!``
``I can't believe myself...
Every day was so much fun but... why, why...?@k@vS09/02/170201789. I didn't have any complaints, I didn't worry about anything... so why did I try to destroy everything with my own two hands...?``
``Rena... you're... you're incredible!``
After I killed you and Mion... ...I didn't realize I had done anything wrong, so I left a note and called Ooishi-san.
I still believed that someone else was at fault.
Until, I mean,@k even after I was dead!
I didn't even notice I had sinned.
How sad it was to kill my friends because of a little misunderstanding, even when they were trying to help me.
And how painful it was not to realize it was a sin...
``Therefore... you're amazing, Rena...@k@vS09/01/170101553. You didn't kill any of your friends.@k@vS09/01/170101554. You came to your senses ...before you committed a sin.
Ha ha, aha ha ha ha ha!!@k@vS09/01/170101556. You're incredible, Rena. ......Just incredible... You're totally different from me!!``
Rena stood up slowly and lowered her hatchet.
``I hurt my friend.@k@vS09/02/170201791. I hurt Mii-chan...``
``Just apologize to her.@k@vS09/01/170101558. Personally, I appreciate that the wounds will help me tell the twins apart.``
``I've already killed...``
``Huh?@k@vS09/01/170101560. No, you haven't.@k@vS09/01/170101561. Who did you kill?``
``......Rina Mamiya... and Teppei Houjou...``
``Ah... those two...``
``......I thought it was right to kill them.
But the day I killed them... the world started to go crazy.@k@vS09/02/170201796. Did that mean...@k@vS09/02/170201797. that it was wrong to kill them...?``
``I don't know if it was right or wrong, but it wasn't the best thing you could have done.``
``What do you mean, the best thing?``
``Don't you know?``
I grabbed Rena's head and embraced her.
Then I told her.
I told her something so simple.
It was so simple that anyone could think of it.
But Rena didn't do it.
I didn't do it either, back then.
``If you're in danger or you feel like doubting others or something sad happens...``
It was so simple...!
``You should talk to... your friends!!!``
``That's right...@k@vS09/02/170201800. You're right. ...Ooh... whaaaahhhhh...``
Rena cried in my arms for a while. ...She cried about the wrong choice she made at the very beginning.
The choice couldn't have been hard to see.
I'm sure it was something that was within her grasp.
How stupid it was to worry about it by herself.
She had friends.
She had friends whom she trusted.
Why did she think she couldn't talk to her friends about it?
``I was wrong...!!@k@vS09/02/170201802. Why didn't I talk about it?@k@vS09/02/170201803. Everyone trusted me, so why didn't I trust them?``
``......I was the same way before.@k@vS09/01/170101568. That's why I won't laugh at you.@k@vS09/01/170101569. But you realized it.@k@vS09/01/170101570. You realized it a lot sooner than I did!!``
We will trust each other.
We will never doubt our friends.
We will rely on each other.
We will talk to each other and help each other.
That's why friends are always happy, and why we can endure anything together...
``Okay, Rena.@k@vS09/01/170101572. Why don't we respond to the curtain call?@k@vS09/01/170101573. This is really the end of everything.``
``Wh-What do you mean by the curtain call? What do you mean?``
``Well, I was just talking to myself.@k@vS09/01/170101575. Come on.``
We stood up together, holding hands.@k ...The moon was hanging behind us.
When I nodded, Rena threw away her hatchet. It disappeared into the darkness below.
Then I spoke to the audience in Hell, the demons who weren't expecting this ending.
I was proclaiming victory!

``That's all for tonight!@k@vS09/01/170101577. We overcame this tragedy!!@k@vS09/01/170101578. We'll never doubt each other again.@k@vS09/01/170101579. We'll be united forever!!@k@vS09/01/170101580. No matter what disaster might befall us, don't think we'll ever yield!!
Who cares about tragedy, who cares about disaster?@k@vS09/01/170101582. Even if the script is written by demons,@k@vS09/01/170101583. we'll tear the whole thing to pieces!!!``
.........There still wasn't any reply from Satoko.
Shit......! If we don't find out where Rena's hidden the incendiary device quickly—!!
We've managed to confine her to this space, but finding the device is what's really important.
Please......... Satoko, you're the only one we're counting on!!
``Ahahahahaha Ahahahahahahahahaha!
Awesome, awesome, it's not like we're having club activities or anything, you know?@k@vS09/02/170201629. Ahahahahahahahahahahahahahahaha!!``
Rena who had thrown Rika-chan aside, swung around to face me as she stood up, her eyes glittering with fury.
And then, with an icy jeer enough to make my hairs stand on their ends, she raised her hatchet above her head.
``Hyaaaaaaaaaaaaa~!!!@k@vS09/02/170201649. I'll smash your head in with a single striiiiiiikeeeeee~!!!!!``
Adrenaline gushing through my veins, I twisted my body to barely dodge Rena's attack as the hatchet sliced through the air.

The hatchet she had swung recklessly sunk into the wooden floor with a thunderous roar, and Rena retracted it as if it were nothing and held it up once more as she sniggered, flashing her red tongue in mirth.
